title: NewsPulse AI - End-to-End NLP Sentiment Analysis Pipeline
problem: Manual market research and media monitoring are highly inefficient, lacking scalable methods to quantify subjective bias and real-time sentiment from fragmented digital news sources.
solution: Architected an automated ETL and NLP pipeline using Python and BeautifulSoup to extract unstructured web data, deploying NLTK to quantify emotional polarity and subjectivity within an interactive Streamlit dashboard.
result1: Eliminated manual news monitoring by instantly processing dynamic URLs, delivering real-time sentiment metrics and interactive data visualizations that accelerate data-driven decision-making.
caseStudy: The primary challenge was handling diverse and unstructured news sources in real-time. By implementing a robust ETL pipeline, we were able to standardize text data before passing it to the NLTK models. The outcome significantly reduced manual effort and provided clear, visualized insights into sentiment trends across different media outlets over time.
challenges: Handling diverse, unstructured news formats in real-time.
Avoiding rate limits and ensuring high accuracy in sentiment models.
Deploying the interactive pipeline efficiently using Streamlit.

title: Alumni Data Management System
problem: Manual tracking of alumni records led to data fragmentation and inefficient communication within the institution.
solution: Engineered a centralized web application using a Flask API and JavaScript to automate database management and alumni networking.
result1: Successfully streamlined data retrieval for 500+ records with a significant reduction in administrative manual entry time.
caseStudy: Building the Alumni Data Management System required a focus on secure data handling and easy accessibility for administrators. We developed a centralized SQL database with a Flask REST API to handle CRUD operations seamlessly. The frontend interface was built to be intuitive, allowing quick searching and filtering of alumni records, thus resolving the previous data fragmentation issues.
challenges: Designing a scalable relational database schema.
Ensuring fast retrieval times for over 500 records.

title: E-Commerce Sales Analitics Dashboard
problem: The business struggled to track real-time profitability and sales trends across different regions, leading to delayed decision-making and inefficient inventory management
solution: Developed an interactive Power BI dashboard using Star Schema and DAX to visualize KPIs like YoY Growth, Profit Margins, and Customer Segmentation with dynamic filtering
result1: Reduced reporting time by 80% and identified high-loss product categories, enabling the management to optimize marketing spend and improve overall profit margins
caseStudy: The e-commerce business lacked visibility into its daily operations and profitability metrics. By structuring the data using a Star Schema, the Power BI dashboard was able to provide high-performance querying and interactive visualizations. Key DAX measures were implemented to track YoY growth and profitability, fundamentally changing how the management team approached inventory and marketing decisions.
challenges: Managing large datasets and complex relationships in Power BI.
Writing advanced DAX to handle dynamic date filtering.
Ensuring fast dashboard load times by optimizing the Star Schema.

title: Facebook Ads Campaign Performance Analysis
problem: The marketing team lacked a unified view to track Ad Spend efficiency (ROAS) and CPA across multiple campaigns, making it difficult to identify underperforming ads in real-time.
solution: Built a Power BI dashboard integrating Facebook Ads data to track funnel metrics (Impressions to Conversions) using DAX for custom metrics and Trend Analysis for budget optimization.
result1: Improved Ad Spend efficiency by 25% through better targeting insights and automated the reporting process, saving the team over 10 hours of manual data entry per week.
caseStudy: Tracking ad performance across dozens of campaigns manually was error-prone. This Power BI solution consolidated Facebook Ads data, applying complex DAX formulas to calculate ROAS and CPA dynamically. The trend analysis capabilities allowed marketers to quickly pause underperforming ads and reallocate budget to high-converting segments, boosting overall efficiency.
challenges: Attributing conversions accurately across complex funnel stages.
Handling discrepancies and missing values in API data exports.
